steps.t: Baradal is standing by in Arhaim. When you are ready to head into the wilds, you should speak to Baradal.
Shathur-munzu is somewhere west of Arhaim. You should start by following the path west from the village.
Baradal believes the owner of the cart may still be alive somewhere in the forest west of Arhaim. You should search for the cart's owner.
The dead cart owner's horse may still be alive somewhere in the forest of Duskenvale. You should find the missing horse.
The horse was spooked by your approach and ran deeper into the forest. You should find the missing horse again.
Shathur-munzu can be found west of Arhaim, in the wilds of Duskenvale. You should find Shathur-munzu.
